meaning: n.先生,阁下,大人,欧洲官员或欧洲移民
examples: The Mem Sahib wrung her hands.
It is most urgent, sahib, "he said."
A sahib has got to act like a sahib;
The generic drugs at issue were manufactured at Ranbaxy's facilities in Paonta Sahib and Dewas, India.
He looks at Albert with the disdainful stare that the pukka sahib directs at a servant who has inconvenienced him.
